title: In Group Discussions: - Encourage: Ask Each Member to Share Unique Perspectives or Information
subtitle: Uncover Hidden Insights
description:
In group discussions:
- Encourage: Ask each member to share unique perspectives or information.
- Facilitate: Guide the conversation to ensure unshared insights are discussed.
- Balance: Avoid spending too much time on what everyone already knows.

Example: Start meetings by asking, "What does everyone know that hasn’t been shared yet?"

faq.question: How do I track my progress with this habit?
faq.answer: Use the check-in method described above and track it in the Life OS app for consistent progress monitoring.

faq.question: What if I miss a day or forget to do this habit?
faq.answer: Don't worry! Life OS habits are designed to be flexible. Just get back on track the next day without judgment.
faq.answerHtml: Don't worry! Life OS habits are designed to be flexible. Just get back on track the next day without judgment.

faq.question: How long does it take to form this habit?
faq.answer: Research shows habits can take 21-66 days to form. Focus on consistency rather than perfection, and use the app to build momentum.

howTo.title: Add the one-sentence pre-meeting prompt
howTo.summary: In your next meeting invite, include a line asking attendees to prepare one unique input related to the agenda item. This should be sent 12–24 hours before the meeting.

howTo.title: Create a Brali check-in
howTo.summary: Set up a check-in in the Brali LifeOS app that prompts attendees to submit their unique input. Schedule this to be sent out 12 hours before the meeting.

howTo.title: Facilitate the meeting with unique input collection
howTo.summary: At the start of the meeting, read the prompt and allocate 45 seconds for each attendee to share their unique input. Capture each input systematically.

howTo.title: Log unique and impactful inputs
howTo.summary: After the meeting, record the number of unique inputs and identify which ones led to changes in decisions or actions. This helps track the effectiveness of the process.

howTo.title: Check in with LifeOS Brali app
howTo.summary: Log your results and insights in the Brali LifeOS app to track progress and refine your approach. Visit https://metalhatscats.com/life-os/bias-aware-meeting-insights/.
